query:
CREATE TABLE `audit_log` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`userId` int NOT NULL,
	`action` varchar(100),
	`entityType` varchar(50),
	`entityId` int,
	`oldValues` json,
	`newValues` json,
	`ipAddress` varchar(45),
	`userAgent` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `audit_log_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `categories` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`slug` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
	`description` text,
	`seoDescription` varchar(160),
	`iconUrl` varchar(500),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `categories_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `categories_slug_unique` UNIQUE(`slug`)
);
CREATE TABLE `competitors` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`domain` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`authorityScore` int,
	`backlinksCount` int,
	`topKeywords` json,
	`lastAnalyzed` timestamp NULL,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `competitors_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `competitors_domain_unique` UNIQUE(`domain`)
);
CREATE TABLE `content_calendar` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`targetKeyword` varchar(255),
	`scheduledDate` date NOT NULL,
	`status` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'planned',
	`priority` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'medium',
	`assignedTo` int,
	`notes` text,
	`articleId` int,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `content_calendar_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `internal_links` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`fromArticleId` int NOT NULL,
	`toArticleId` int NOT NULL,
	`anchorText` varchar(255),
	`linkType` varchar(20),
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `internal_links_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);
CREATE TABLE `keywords` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`keyword` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
	`searchVolume` int,
	`keywordDifficulty` int,
	`cpc` float,
	`competition` float,
	`trend` varchar(10),
	`currentRank` int,
	`previousRank` int,
	`rankUpdatedAt` timestamp NULL,
	`targetArticleId` int,
	`targetPosition` int DEFAULT 1,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	CONSTRAINT `keywords_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
	CONSTRAINT `keywords_keyword_unique` UNIQUE(`keyword`)
);
CREATE TABLE `seo_tasks` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`articleId` int NOT NULL,
	`taskType` varchar(50),
	`status` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'pending',
	`result` json,
	`errorMessage` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`completedAt` timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT `seo_tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
)

	`trend` varchar(10),
	`currentRank` int,
	`previousRank` int,
	`rankUpdatedAt` timestamp NULL,
	`targetArticleId` int,
	`targetPosition` int DEFAULT 1,

CREATE TABLE `seo_tasks` (
	`id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
	`articleId` int NOT NULL,
	`taskType` varchar(50),
	`status` varchar(20) DEFAULT 'pending',
	`result` json,
	`errorMessage` text,
	`createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
	`completedAt` timestamp NULL,
	CONSTRAINT `seo_tasks_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
